sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT
   hpda.`Incident Number`,
   hpda.`InstanceId`,
   hpda.`Company`,
   hpda.`Organization`,
   hpda.`Department`,
   hpda.`First Name`,
   hpda.`Middle Initial`,
   hpda.`Last Name`,
   hpda.`Customer Login ID`,
   hpda.`Phone Number`,
   hpda.`Internet E-mail`
FROM `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive` as hpda
where (
hpda.`Incident Number` in ($IncidentID) 
)

SELECT
`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Status` AS Status,
`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Status_Reason` AS Status_Reason,
`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Impact` AS Impact,
`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Urgency` AS Urgency,
`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Priority` AS Priority,
`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Priority Weight` AS Priority_Weight
FROM `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`
where (
`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Incident Number` in ($IncidentID))

SELECT
`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Reported Source`,
`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Reported Date`,
`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Service Type` AS IncidentType,
`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Description` AS Summary,
`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Detailed Decription` AS Notes
FROM `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`
where (
`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Incident Number` in ($IncidentID))

SELECT
  `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Company`,
`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Direct Contact First Name`,
`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Direct Contact Last Name`,
`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Department`,
`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Organization`
FROM `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`
where (
`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Incident Number` in ($IncidentID))

SELECT
`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Assignee`,
`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Assigned Support Company`,
`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Assigned Support Organization`,
`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Assigned Group`
FROM `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`
where (
`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Incident Number` in ($IncidentID))

SELECT
  `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Company` AS Company,
`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Region` AS Region,
`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Site Group` AS Site_Group,
`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Site` AS Site
FROM `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`
where (
`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Incident Number` in ($IncidentID))

SELECT
`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Resolution Category`,
`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Resolution`,
`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Status_Reason`
FROM `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`
where (
`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Incident Number` in ($IncidentID))

SELECT
  `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Categorization Tier 1` AS 'Tier 1',
  `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Categorization Tier 2`AS 'Tier 2',
  `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Categorization Tier 3` AS 'Tier 3'
FROM `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`
where ( 
`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Incident Number` in ($IncidentID))

SELECT
  `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Product Categorization Tier 1` AS 'Tier 1',
  `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Product Categorization Tier 2` AS 'Tier 2',
  `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Product Categorization Tier 3` AS 'Tier 3',
  `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Manufacturer`,
`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Product Name`,
`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Product Model/Version`
FROM `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`
where (
`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Incident Number` in ($IncidentID))

SELECT 
`HPD:Associations`.`Request ID01` AS WorkOrderID,
 `WOI:WorkOrder`.`Work Order Type`,
   `WOI:WorkOrder`.`Summary`,
   `WOI:WorkOrder`.`Business Service`,
    `WOI:WorkOrder`.`Support Group Name` AS mgrsgp,
   `WOI:WorkOrder`.`ASGRP` AS Assigneesgp,
   `WOI:WorkOrder`.`Customer Company`,
 `WOI:WorkOrder`.`Customer Organization`,
    `WOI:WorkOrder`.`Status`,
   `WOI:WorkOrder`.`Status Reason`,
   `WOI:WorkOrder`.`Priority`
FROM `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Associations`
inner join `WOI:WorkOrder` 
ON `HPD:Associations`.`Request ID01` = `WOI:WorkOrder`.`Request ID`
where `HPD:Associations`.`Form Name01`= 'WOI:WorkOrder' 
and `HPD:Associations`.`Request ID02` in ($IncidentID)

SELECT DISTINCT
          TMS_TASK_ARCHIVE.`Task ID` AS `TaskID`
         ,TMS_TASK_ARCHIVE.TaskType AS `TaskType`
         ,TMS_TASK_ARCHIVE.TaskName AS `TaskName`
         ,TMS_TASK_ARCHIVE.Status AS `Status`
         ,TMS_TASK_ARCHIVE.Sequence AS `Sequence`
 
FROM `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive` HPD_HELP_DESK_ARCHIVE LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`TMS:Task_Archive` TMS_TASK_ARCHIVE
     ON ( HPD_HELP_DESK_ARCHIVE.`Incident Number` = TMS_TASK_ARCHIVE.RootRequestID )
    WHERE HPD_HELP_DESK_ARCHIVE.`Incident Number` = ${IncidentID}

list.definition: remedy,{"sql": "SELECT DISTINCT `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Incident Number` FROM `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive` WHERE  `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000 and `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Company` in ($company) and `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Priority` in ($priority) and `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Status` in ($Status) and `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Assigned Group` in ($AssignedGroup) LIMIT 10"}
list.label: Incident Id
list.name: IncidentID
list.query: remedy,{"sql": "SELECT DISTINCT `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Incident Number` FROM `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive` WHERE  `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000 and `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Company` in ($company) and `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Priority` in ($priority) and `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Status` in ($Status) and `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Assigned Group` in ($AssignedGroup) LIMIT 10"}
